description: Skill definitions â€” controls all skill properties including damage, mana cost, synergies, and visual effects.

skill.description: Internal skill name (used by other tables to reference this skill). Not read by 1.13c engine

Id.description: Unique numeric skill ID. Not read by 1.13c engine

charclass.description: Character class this skill belongs to (empty = all classes). Classic uses full names (amazon), patch uses codes (ama).

skilldesc.description: Reference to skill description entry. Not read by 1.13c engine

srvstfunc.description: Server start function ID - executed when skill is first activated

srvdofunc.description: Server do function ID - executed when start function completes or periodically while held

prgstack.description: Whether progressive charges stack (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

srvprgfunc1.description: Server progressive function 1 - called when charges are released

decquant.description: Decreases ammunition quantity when used (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

lob.description: Missile uses lobbed arc trajectory (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

srvoverlay.description: Server-side overlay effect applied when skill is used

aurafilter.description: Binary filter controlling which unit types are affected by this aura

aurastate.description: State applied to the caster by this aura

auratargetstate.description: State applied to targets within aura range

aurarangecalc.description: Calculation for aura radius in subtiles

auraevent1.description: Event 1 that triggers the aura event function

auraeventfunc1.description: Function ID called when aura event 1 triggers

auraevent2.description: Event 2 that triggers the aura event function

auraeventfunc2.description: Function ID called when aura event 2 triggers

auraevent3.description: Event 3 that triggers the aura event function

auraeventfunc3.description: Function ID called when aura event 3 triggers

auratgteventfunc.description: Function ID called when aura target event triggers

passivestate.description: State applied when this passive skill is learned

passiveitype.description: Item type code restricting passive to specific weapon types (ref ItemTypes.txt)

passivestat1.description: Passive stat 1 modified by this skill

passivestat2.description: Passive stat 2 modified by this skill

passivestat3.description: Passive stat 3 modified by this skill

passivestat4.description: Passive stat 4 modified by this skill

passivestat5.description: Passive stat 5 modified by this skill

passiveevent.description: Event that triggers the passive event function

passiveeventfunc.description: Function ID called when passive event triggers

summon.description: Monster summoned by this skill (ref monstats.txt)

pettype.description: Summon group controlling coexistence, UI icon, and warp behavior. Not read by 1.13c engine

petmax.description: Maximum number of summons allowed (can be a calculation). Not read by 1.13c engine

summode.description: Animation mode the summon plays when created (e.g. NU, S1, S2)

sumskill1.description: Skill 1 granted to the summoned creature

sumsk1calc.description: Skill level calculation for summon skill 1

sumskill2.description: Skill 2 granted to the summoned creature

sumsk2calc.description: Skill level calculation for summon skill 2

sumskill3.description: Skill 3 granted to the summoned creature

sumsk3calc.description: Skill level calculation for summon skill 3

sumskill4.description: Skill 4 granted to the summoned creature

sumsk4calc.description: Skill level calculation for summon skill 4

sumskill5.description: Skill 5 granted to the summoned creature

sumsk5calc.description: Skill level calculation for summon skill 5

sumumod.description: Unique modifier applied to summoned creature

sumoverlay.description: Overlay effect displayed when summon appears

stsuccessonly.description: Sound plays only on successful cast (1 = yes)

stsound.description: Sound played when skill starts casting

stsoundclass.description: Class-specific sound played on skill start

stsounddelay.description: Whether the start sound is delayed (1 = yes)

dosound.description: Sound played when skill do function executes

tgtsound.description: Sound played on target when hit by this skill

castoverlay.description: Overlay effect displayed on caster during cast

cltoverlaya.description: Client overlay A (e.g. shapeshift transformation in)

cltoverlayb.description: Client overlay B (e.g. shapeshift transformation out)

cltstfunc.description: Client start function ID - visual counterpart of srvstfunc

cltdofunc.description: Client do function ID - visual counterpart of srvdofunc

cltprgfunc1.description: Client progressive function 1 - visual effect for charge release

warp.description: Skill teleports the caster (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

immediate.description: Skill activates immediately without animation (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

enhanceable.description: Damage can be enhanced by +% damage modifiers (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

attackrank.description: Priority rank for attack rating calculation (0-10)

noammo.description: Skill does not consume ammunition (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

weapsel.description: Weapon selection mode (1=left, 2=either, 3=both, 4=armor). Not read by 1.13c engine

itypea1.description: Required item type A1 for weapon set A (ref ItemTypes.txt)

itypea2.description: Required item type A2 for weapon set A (ref ItemTypes.txt)

itypea3.description: Required item type A3 for weapon set A (ref ItemTypes.txt)

etypea1.description: Excluded item type A1 for weapon set A (ref ItemTypes.txt)

etypea2.description: Excluded item type A2 for weapon set A (ref ItemTypes.txt)

itypeb1.description: Required item type B1 for weapon set B (ref ItemTypes.txt)

itypeb2.description: Required item type B2 for weapon set B (ref ItemTypes.txt)

itypeb3.description: Required item type B3 for weapon set B (ref ItemTypes.txt)

etypeb1.description: Excluded item type B1 for weapon set B (ref ItemTypes.txt)

etypeb2.description: Excluded item type B2 for weapon set B (ref ItemTypes.txt)

anim.description: Animation mode (e.g., 'SC' for spell cast). Not read by 1.13c engine

seqtrans.description: Sequence transition mode. Not read by 1.13c engine

monanim.description: Monster animation mode when using this skill

seqnum.description: Player animation sequence ID (used when anim=SQ). Not read by 1.13c engine

seqinput.description: Sequence input frame for transitioning between animations. Not read by 1.13c engine

durability.description: Skill drains weapon durability (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

UseAttackRate.description: Use weapon attack rate for animation speed (1 = yes)

LineOfSight.description: Line-of-sight check mode (4 = standard wall check). Not read by 1.13c engine

TargetableOnly.description: Can only target targetable units (1 = yes)

SearchEnemyXY.description: Search for enemy at cursor position (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

SearchEnemyNear.description: Search for nearest enemy to caster (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

SearchOpenXY.description: Search for open position at target XY (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

SelectProc.description: Target selection procedure (1-6, various targeting modes). Not read by 1.13c engine

TargetItem.description: Can target items on ground (1 = yes)

AttackNoMana.description: Attack continues even when mana runs out (1 = yes)

TgtPlaceCheck.description: Check if target location is valid placement (1 = yes)

ItemEffect.description: Server function ID when skill is triggered by item (chance-to-cast)

ItemCltEffect.description: Client function ID when skill is triggered by item

ItemTgtDo.description: Apply item target do function (1 = yes)

ItemTarget.description: Item cast target (1=self, 2=random pos, 3=random corpse, 4=last attacker)

ItemCheckStart.description: Server-side check on item-triggered skill start (1 = yes)

ItemCltCheckStart.description: Client-side check on item-triggered skill start (1 = yes)

ItemCastSound.description: Sound played when skill is cast from an item

ItemCastOverlay.description: Overlay effect when skill is cast from an item

skpoints.description: Skill points column (unused in 1.10+). Not read by 1.13c engine

reqstr.description: Required strength (unused, always blank). Not read by 1.13c engine

reqdex.description: Required dexterity (unused, always blank). Not read by 1.13c engine

reqint.description: Required intelligence (unused, always blank). Not read by 1.13c engine

reqvit.description: Required vitality (unused, always blank). Not read by 1.13c engine

restrict.description: Class restriction (1=class-specific, 2=class-specific alternate). Not read by 1.13c engine

state1.description: Required state 1 to use this skill (e.g. bear, wolf)

state2.description: Required state 2 to use this skill

state3.description: Required state 3 to use this skill

delay.description: Cooldown delay in frames (25 frames = 1 second)

leftskill.description: Can be assigned to left mouse button (1 = yes)

repeat.description: Skill repeats while mouse is held (1 = yes)

checkfunc.description: Pre-cast check function ID (1-6, various conditions). Not read by 1.13c engine

nocostinstate.description: No mana cost while in a specific state (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

usemanaondo.description: Mana is spent on do function rather than start (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

startmana.description: Initial mana cost multiplier on first cast. Not read by 1.13c engine

minmana.description: Minimum mana cost (floor). Not read by 1.13c engine

manashift.description: Bit shift for mana cost precision (higher = finer granularity). Not read by 1.13c engine

mana.description: Base mana cost. Not read by 1.13c engine

lvlmana.description: Additional mana cost per skill level. Not read by 1.13c engine

interrupt.description: Skill can be interrupted by hit recovery (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

InTown.description: Skill can be used in town (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

aura.description: Skill is an aura (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

periodic.description: Skill triggers periodically while active (1 = yes)

perdelay.description: Delay between periodic triggers (in frames or calculation)

finishing.description: Skill is a finishing move that consumes charges (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

passive.description: Skill is passive and always active (1 = yes)

progressive.description: Skill is a charge-up/progressive skill (1 = yes)

general.description: General skill available to all classes (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

scroll.description: Skill can be used from a scroll (1 = yes)

calc1.description: General calculation 1 used by skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

calc2.description: General calculation 2 used by skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

calc3.description: General calculation 3 used by skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

calc4.description: General calculation 4 used by skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param1.description: Numeric parameter 1 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param2.description: Numeric parameter 2 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param3.description: Numeric parameter 3 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param4.description: Numeric parameter 4 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param5.description: Numeric parameter 5 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param6.description: Numeric parameter 6 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param7.description: Numeric parameter 7 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

Param8.description: Numeric parameter 8 passed to skill functions. Not read by 1.13c engine

ToHit.description: Base attack rating bonus. Not read by 1.13c engine

LevToHit.description: Attack rating bonus per skill level. Not read by 1.13c engine

ToHitCalc.description: Calculation overriding ToHit/LevToHit when present. Not read by 1.13c engine

ResultFlags.description: Bitfield controlling hit results (1=knockback, 4=stun, etc.). Not read by 1.13c engine

HitFlags.description: Bitfield for hit behavior flags. Not read by 1.13c engine

HitClass.description: Hit class controlling hit sound and visual effect. Not read by 1.13c engine

Kick.description: Skill uses kick attack (1 = yes). Not read by 1.13c engine

HitShift.description: Bit shift for damage precision (typically 8 = 256ths). Not read by 1.13c engine

SrcDam.description: Percentage of weapon damage applied (128=100%, 64=50%). Not read by 1.13c engine

MinDam.description: Minimum physical damage at base level. Not read by 1.13c engine

MinLevDam1.description: Min damage bonus per level (levels 2-8). Not read by 1.13c engine

MinLevDam2.description: Min damage bonus per level (levels 9-16). Not read by 1.13c engine

MinLevDam3.description: Min damage bonus per level (levels 17-22). Not read by 1.13c engine

MinLevDam4.description: Min damage bonus per level (levels 23-28). Not read by 1.13c engine

MinLevDam5.description: Min damage bonus per level (levels 29+). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxDam.description: Maximum physical damage at base level. Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxLevDam1.description: Max damage bonus per level (levels 2-8). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxLevDam2.description: Max damage bonus per level (levels 9-16). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxLevDam3.description: Max damage bonus per level (levels 17-22). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxLevDam4.description: Max damage bonus per level (levels 23-28). Not read by 1.13c engine

MaxLevDam5.description: Max damage bonus per level (levels 29+). Not read by 1.13c engine

DmgSymPerCalc.description: Synergy calculation for physical damage bonus. Not read by 1.13c engine

EType.description: Elemental damage type. Not read by 1.13c engine

EMin.description: Minimum elemental damage at base level. Not read by 1.13c engine

EMinLev1.description: Min elemental damage bonus per level (levels 2-8). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMinLev2.description: Min elemental damage bonus per level (levels 9-16). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMinLev3.description: Min elemental damage bonus per level (levels 17-22). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMinLev4.description: Min elemental damage bonus per level (levels 23-28). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMinLev5.description: Min elemental damage bonus per level (levels 29+). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMax.description: Maximum elemental damage at base level. Not read by 1.13c engine

EMaxLev1.description: Max elemental damage bonus per level (levels 2-8). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMaxLev2.description: Max elemental damage bonus per level (levels 9-16). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMaxLev3.description: Max elemental damage bonus per level (levels 17-22). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMaxLev4.description: Max elemental damage bonus per level (levels 23-28). Not read by 1.13c engine

EMaxLev5.description: Max elemental damage bonus per level (levels 29+). Not read by 1.13c engine

EDmgSymPerCalc.description: Synergy calculation for elemental damage bonus. Not read by 1.13c engine

ELen.description: Base elemental effect duration in frames (poison/cold/stun). Not read by 1.13c engine

ELevLen1.description: Duration bonus per level (levels 2-8). Not read by 1.13c engine

ELevLen2.description: Duration bonus per level (levels 9-16). Not read by 1.13c engine

ELevLen3.description: Duration bonus per level (levels 17-22). Not read by 1.13c engine

ELenSymPerCalc.description: Synergy calculation for elemental duration bonus. Not read by 1.13c engine

aitype.description: AI targeting type for this skill. Not read by 1.13c engine

aibonus.description: AI bonus parameter for targeting priority. Not read by 1.13c engine

cost mult.description: Mana cost multiplier for this skill. Not read by 1.13c engine

cost add.description: Flat mana cost added to base cost. Not read by 1.13c engine
